description: Create feature branch, delete all legacy api/ and api-v2/ folders from all 9 apps, and update package.json scripts that reference them
steps: Run: git checkout -b feat/phase-09-data-plane from main

Update apps/quantmail/package.json: change 'main' from 'api/server.ts' to 'backend/app.ts', remove dev:backend and build:backend scripts that reference api/. Keep backend typecheck via tsconfig.backend.json if it exists.
For each other app's package.json, check if 'main' or scripts reference api/ and update them to point to backend/
Verify: grep -r 'new Map<' apps/ --include='*.ts' | grep -v 'test\|spec\|cache\|__tests__' should be empty or near-empty
Run: pnpm turbo typecheck to confirm nothing breaks (backend/ folders are self-contained)
Commit: refactor: delete all legacy in-memory api/ folders from apps
acceptance_criteria: No api/ or api-v2/ directories exist under apps/
All app package.json files have valid main/scripts entries pointing to backend/
findings: Deleted 465 files (66,332 lines) of legacy api/ code. All typecheck failures in turbo typecheck are pre-existing (missing dist output from @quant/common, @quant/server-core). Same failures exist on main. Updated package.json main/scripts in all 9 apps to point to backend/app.ts. Removed api/**/*.ts from tsconfig include arrays in 9 tsconfig files. NODE_OPTIONS env var must be cleared for git commit hooks and turbo to work.
